label: Nominal Journal
description: Double-entry nominal journal. Creates: multiple ntran rows (debits and credits must balance). No cashbook involvement. Updates: nacnt, nhist. Used for payroll journals, accruals, prepayments, corrections.

user_fields.name: department_code
user_fields.label: Department
user_fields.condition: Check nacnt analysis settings for target nominal account

user_fields.name: project_code
user_fields.label: Project
user_fields.condition: Check nacnt analysis settings for target nominal account

validation_rules: Total debits must equal total credits
